title: Brachychiton delabechei
taxonomy: Brachychiton delabechei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow or hibiscus family. This plant is native to Australia and is often found in eastern regions. It belongs to the genus Brachychiton, which includes several other species of trees and shrubs. The specific epithet 'delabechei' refers to the plant's unique characteristics. As a member of the Malvaceae family, Brachychiton delabechei is closely related to other plants such as hibiscus and okra.
